name: Analyze Spreadsheet Data
goal: Read the specified Excel/CSV file. Analyze the data for: trends, outliers, totals, averages, and any notable patterns. Generate a clear summary with key findings and recommendations. Format output as a brief executive summary followed by detailed breakdown.

name: Draft Professional Email
goal: Draft a professional email for the specified context. Tone: professional but approachable. Include: clear subject line, greeting, body with key points, call-to-action, and sign-off. Keep it concise — under 200 words. If replying, reference the original message. Finance/operations context at John Deere.

name: Meeting Prep Package
goal: Prepare a meeting prep package for the specified meeting. Include: 1) Agenda with time allocations, 2) Key talking points for each topic, 3) Questions to ask, 4) Data points or metrics to reference, 5) Potential action items to propose. Format as a clean, printable document.

name: Monthly Close Checklist
goal: Generate a month-end close checklist for operating finance. Include: reconciliation items, variance analysis steps, journal entries to review, reports to generate, deadlines, and sign-off requirements. Flag items that typically cause issues. Customize based on the current month and any specified focus areas.

name: Variance Analysis Report
goal: Perform a variance analysis on the specified budget vs actual data. For each line item: calculate $ variance and % variance. Flag items exceeding 5% threshold. Provide root cause hypotheses for significant variances. Generate an executive summary with top 5 variances and recommended actions.

name: Process Documentation
goal: Document the specified process step-by-step. Include: process name, owner, frequency, inputs, outputs, systems used, decision points, exception handling, and approval requirements. Format as a standard operating procedure (SOP) with numbered steps. Include a RACI matrix if multiple roles are involved.

name: Presentation Builder
goal: Create presentation content (slide-by-slide) for the specified topic. Each slide: title, 3-5 bullet points, speaker notes. Include: executive summary slide, data slides with chart descriptions, analysis slides, recommendation slide, next steps slide. Tone: executive-ready, data-driven, concise.

name: Side Project Sprint Plan
goal: Review the specified side project's current state (git log, README, open issues). Generate a focused sprint plan: 5-8 tasks ranked by impact, each with clear acceptance criteria. Estimate effort (small/medium/large). Identify blockers. Output as a checklist ready to execute.

name: Code Review + Fix
goal: Review the latest changes in the specified project. Check for: bugs, security issues, performance problems, code quality, test coverage gaps. For any issue found with HIGH confidence, fix it directly. Commit fixes. Report what was found and what was fixed.

name: Weekly Status Update
goal: Generate a weekly status update email. Sections: 1) Key accomplishments this week, 2) In-progress items with % complete, 3) Blockers/risks, 4) Plan for next week, 5) Metrics/KPIs if applicable. Pull from git activity and task completions. Professional tone, bullet points, under 300 words.
